<js>
sort = [];
L = String(baseUrl).replace(/^h.*?\=/,'').split('★');
for (i = 0; i < L.length; i ++) {
  sort.push ({
    title: L[i].match(/【(.*?)】/)[1],
    date: L[i].match(/】(.*?)＃/)[1],
    img: L[i].match(/＃(.*)/)[1],
    link: L[i].match(/(.*?)【/)[1]
  });
};
JSON.stringify(sort);
</js>
